verses.text: Tua khit ciangin a nungzuite omna Tiberias Tuili gei-ah Jesuh kilang leuleu a, a thu pian'zia hih bang ahi hi
Simon Peter, Unau Peeng minno a nei Thomas, Galilee gam Kana khuami Nethanel, Zebedi' tapate, leh nungzui dang nihte mun khatah a omkhawm uh hi

Simon Peter in a lawmte kiangah, “Kei, ngasa bengin kuan ning,” ci-in a gen leh a lawmte in, “Ko zong hong kuan nung,” ci uh ahih manin, amaute kuankhia-in gunkuang tungah a tuang uh hi. Ahi zongin tua zanin ngasa khat zong manlo uh hi
Zingsang khua a vak ciangin tui gei-ah Jesuh ding a, ahi zongin a nungzuite in amah ahihlam theilo uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tangvalte aw, ngasa na man uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh amaute in, “Bangmah ka man kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Na gunkuang taklam pang uhah na ngen uh paii le uh cin na man ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong a ngen uh paii uh a, ngasa tam awk lua ahih manin a ngen uh a kaizo kei uh hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in a it nungzuipa in Peter kiangah, “Topa hi!” a ci hi. Simon Peter in Topa ahihna thu a zak ciangin (a nga betna uhah a puante uh suahkhia uh ahih manin) a puan silh buatbuatin tui sungah a lengkhia hi
Nungzui dangte ahih leh gunkuang mahah tuangin a ngen uh tawh ngasa a dimtakin a hong kai uh hi. Tua lai mun leh a tui gei pen pi zathum bang bek kigamla hi
Tui gei a tun' uh ciangin mei-am tungah ngasa leh anlum a ki-em a mu uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Tu-a na ngasa matte uh pawlkhat hong paipih un,” ci-in a gen ciangin
Simon Peter zong gunkuang tungah va kahin ngasa a dimin a om ngen va kai a, ngasa a vekpi-in za leh sawmnga leh thum pha-in tam mahmah napi-in a ngen uh themkhat zong kikeklo hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hong pai un; zing an ne ni,” a ci hi. Amah pen Topa ahih lamtak thei uh ahih manin, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a nungzuite khat beek in dong ngamlo uh hi
Jesuh hong pai-in anlum la-in amaute tungah pia a, tua mah bangin ngasa zong a pia hi
Hih pen sihna panin Jesuh a kithawhkik sak khitzawh nungzuite tungah a kilah a thum veina hita hi.

An a nekkhit uh ciangin Jesuh in Simon Peter kiangah, “Johan' tapa Simon aw, hih adang khempeuhte' hong it sangin kei na hong nak itzaw hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amah in, “Topa aw, ka hong itzaw hi. Nang ka hong itna na thei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Ka tuunote na kem in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nihveina dong leuleu a, “Johan' tapa Simon aw, kei na hong it hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Topa aw, nang ka hong it a, ka hong itna thu na thei hi,” a cih ciangin, “Ka tuute na kem in,” a ci leuleu hi

Jesuh in a thumveina dong leuleu a, “Johan' tapa Simon aw, kei na hong it hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Kei na hong it hiam?” ci-in thumvei tak a dotna hangin Peter zong a dah suak hi. Tua ahih manin, “Topa aw, nangmah in na khempeuh na thei a, nangmah ka hong itna thu zong na thei hi,” ci-in a dawn' ciangin Jesuh in, “Ka tuute na kem in

A mantakin ci lehang, na khangno lai-in na kawnggak gakin na utna peuhah na pai zialzial thei hi. Ahi zongin na khangham ciangin na khutte na zan ding a, midangte in na khutte hong henin na utlohnapi-ah hong paipih ding uh hi,” a ci hi
(Hih bangin a thugenna pen Peter a sihna ding zia leh Pasian' min a than'sakna ding thu a gen nopna ahi hi.) Tua ciangin Jesuh in Peter kiangah, “Hong zui un,” a ci hi.
Peter a kihei ciangin, nitak an a nek lai-un Jesuh' gei-ah tu-in, “Topa aw, nang kua in hong lehhek ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong, Jesuh' it a nungzuipa ama nungah a om a mu hi
Peter in amah a muh ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, hih mipa bangci ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh
Jesuh in, “Ka hong paikik mateng amah a nungta dingin ka deih nak leh nang bang phamawh sa na hi hiam? Nangmah in ka nung hong zui peuh in,” ci-in a dawng hi

Tua ahih manin hih nungzuipa silo ding hi, ci-in a nungzuite lakah a kigen hi. Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Amah silo ding hi,” a ci hiloin, “Ka hong paikik mateng amah a nungta dingin ka deih nak leh nang bang phamawh sa na hi hiam?” a ci bek ahi hi
Jesuh in tua a cih nungzuipa pen hih thute genin lai sungah a gelhpa hi a, ama thugente a mantaktak hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi
Jesuh in a sep thute tampi tak omlai hi. A sep khempeuh a ban banin laibu sungah a kigelh hi leh a laibute pen leitungah ta zolo ding hi, ci-in ka um hi.
